questions.question: Which kingdom in Whittaker's classification includes both unicellular and multicellular eukaryotes with diverse nutrition?
A group of organisms which are most closely related is:
Identify the correctly written scientific name:
Index Kewensis is a publication that lists:

options.B: Names of all known species of flowering plants

questions.question: Which of the following is a correct statement regarding key in taxonomy?

options.A: It is used to identify plants based on contrasting characters
options.B: It is a list of plant names
options.C: It is used to preserve plant specimens
options.D: It is a botanical garden catalogue

questions.question: Which organisms are good pollution indicators and do not grow in polluted areas?
The 'Three Domain' system of classification (Archaea, Bacteria, Eukarya) was proposed by:
A 'Genus' is a group of related ______ that have more characteristics in common.
Which of the following is the 'Taxonomic' hierarchy in correct descending order?

options.A: Kingdom, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species
options.B: Kingdom, Class, Family, Phylum, Order, Genus, Species
options.C: Species, Genus, Family, Order, Class, Phylum, Kingdom
options.D: Species, Kingdom, Phylum, Genus, Order, Family, Class

questions.question: What is the 'IUPAC' equivalent for naming plants?
The 'Herbarium' specimen has a label that contains which type of information?

options.A: Date/Place of collection, English/Local/Botanical names, Family, and Collector's name

questions.question: The 'Botanical Gardens' specialize in the collection of ______ for identification purposes.
Which of the following describes a 'Manual' in taxonomic study?

options.A: Information for identification of names of species found in an area
options.B: Detailed description of a single taxon

questions.question: The term 'Systematics' deals with:

options.A: Classification and evolutionary relationships between organisms

questions.question: Which of the following is a 'Polymorphic' species?
The 'Type' specimen used in original description of a species is called:
In the binomial nomenclature of *Mangifera indica* L., what does 'L.' represent?

options.A: The author Linnaeus who first described the species

questions.question: What is the 'Suffix' for the rank of Family in plants?
Which of the following is a 'Higher' taxonomic category than Class?
The 'Flora' contains an account of habitat and distribution of ______ in a given area.
